name: V.S.T. Tillers Tractors Limited
summary: V.S.T. Tillers Tractors Limited engages in the manufacture and trading of agriculture machinery primarily in India. The company provides power tillers, tractors, rice transplanters, power reapers, rotary tillers, attachments, and engines. It also offers diesel engine components, such as case covers, transmission and crank cases, camshafts, crank shafts, and connecting rods; and light engineering components comprising fuel pump clamps, balancer weights, hydraulic actuators, brake shoes and yokes, suspension links, and caliper levers. The company markets its products through a network of dealers and vendors. V.S.T. Tillers Tractors Limited also exports its products to Africa, Russia, and Myanmar; and component parts to the United Kingdom and Europe. The company was founded in 1967 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
